历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for science/physics category was approximately 10274 → 10028 → 14059 → 9872 → 8814, showing an overall fluctuating downward trend (ranking numbers decreasing, competition intensifying). The 2025 baseline is about 8814, a significant forward shift of about 1058 places compared to 2024. The provincial science/physics enrollment plan was 26 students in 2021–2022, 24 students in 2023–2025, and will increase to 27 students in 2026, an expansion of 12.5% compared to 2025, which helps reduce competition intensity.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211, Double First-Class; approximately 77th on the Soft Science Main Ranking (2026), with recent rankings stable in the 72–81 range, belonging to the upper-middle tier of 211 universities. In 2024, reputation was slightly negative (campus molestation incident), but the 2026 reputation file does not mention Fuzhou University, indicating recent public opinion is stable. Douyin popularity is average (88th overall), with moderate short video exposure. Chemistry (A-) is the only A- or above discipline, directly corresponding to the university's enrollment majors such as Chemistry, Chemical Engineering and Technology, and Materials Science and Engineering, providing some support for related major applications.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Engineering majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering continue to have high social popularity. Fuzhou University's enrollment in Jilin Province includes Computer Science and Technology, Optoelectronic Information Science and Engineering, Vehicle Engineering, etc., all of which are popular directions. The total number of examinees in the province in 2026 is about 110,868, a slight decrease of about 0.6% from 111,492 in 2025. The estimated number of physics category examinees is about 79,968, a slight decrease from 80,421 in 2025, so competition pressure is roughly flat. Fuzhou University is located in Fujian Province, far from Jilin Province, so cross-province applications have certain regional preference differences. The university is in Jilin.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 8814, the 12.5% enrollment expansion in 2026 (expansion pushes ranking numbers higher), the slight decrease in total examinees, and the high popularity of majors, and noting that the 2025 ranking has moved forward for two consecutive years (intensified competition) while the large expansion will push the ranking backward, and that popular majors like Computer Science and Electronic Information continue to attract high-scoring students, the predicted minimum ranking for 2026 is about 9350, with a range of 8950–9750.

- Optoelectronic Information Science and Engineering
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Moderate)

- Chemistry
- Process Equipment and Control Engineering
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)

- Water Supply and Drainage Science and Engineering (Double Degree)
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 8950–9750, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice, use Tier 1 Computer Science and Technology as a reach, and Tier 3 majors as safety. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit (<8950), you can focus on reaching for Tier 1 popular majors. If your ranking is close to the upper limit (>9750), it is recommended to prioritize Tier 3 majors.

历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for liberal arts/history category were approximately 2127 → 1940 → 1508 → 1887 → 2059, showing significant fluctuations overall, with the lowest in 2023 (1508th) and a rebound to 2059th in 2025; the past three years show a pattern of first rising then falling. The provincial liberal arts/history category enrollment plan was 4 students in 2021–2022, 6 students in 2023–2025, and will sharply decrease to 3 students in 2026, a 50% reduction compared to 2025, which will significantly intensify competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211, Double First-Class; Soft Science main ranking approximately 77th (2026), stable in recent years; reputation was slightly negative in 2024 (campus safety incident), but Fuzhou University did not appear in the 2026 reputation document, indicating the public opinion has stabilized; Douyin popularity is average; Chemistry A- is the only A- or above discipline, with no direct connection to liberal arts admission majors (Law, Logistics Management).

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Law has relatively high social popularity (recommended), Logistics Management belongs to management category with average popularity; the estimated number of history category examinees in the province in 2026 is about 30,900, slightly down from 31,071 in 2025, so competition pressure is roughly the same; Fuzhou University is located in Fujian Province, far from Jilin Province, so cross-province application involves regional preference differences; the university's liberal arts enrollment scale in Jilin Province is very small (3–6 students), limiting the impact of regional factors.

预测结论.text: Based on the 2025 baseline ranking of 2059th, the 2026 enrollment reduction of 50% (which pushes the ranking number smaller), and the relatively high popularity of Law, considering the significant reduction in enrollment which greatly pushes the ranking forward, and Law continuing to attract high-scoring liberal arts candidates, the predicted minimum ranking for 2026 is approximately 1500th, with a range of 1400–1600th.
